footnotes.F1: Shares sold by Hestia Capital Partners, LP ("Hestia Capital") in order to better align with the maximum concentration guidelines for single stock investment of Hestia Capital.
footnotes.F2: The price reported in column 4 is a weighted average price, rounded to the nearest cent. These shares were sold in multiple transactions at prices ranging from $19.33 to $20.33, inclusive. The reporting person undertakes to provide to GameStop Corp., any security holder of GameStop Corp. or the staff of the Securities and Exchange Commission, upon request, full information regarding the number of shares sold at each separate price within the range.
footnotes.F3: Shares beneficially owned directly by Hestia Capital. Hestia Capital Management, LLC ("Hestia LLC"), as the general partner of Hestia Capital, and Mr. Wolf, as the managing member of Hestia LLC, may also be deemed the beneficial owner of these shares.
footnotes.F4: Mr. Wolf disclaims beneficial ownership of the shares except to the extent of his pecuniary interest therein, if any, and this report shall not be deemed an admission that Mr. Wolf is the beneficial owner of the shares for purposes of Section 16 of the Securities Exchange Act of 1934, as amended, or for any other purpose.
footnotes.F5: Represents shares held in two separately managed accounts that were previously reported as beneficially owned by Hestia LLC, of which Mr. Wolf serves as the managing member. Such shares were returned to the account holders and as such, these shares are no longer deemed to be beneficially owned by Hestia LLC or Mr. Wolf.
footnotes.F6: Shares held in a separately managed account that is beneficially owned by Hestia LLC. Mr. Wolf, as the managing member of Hestia LLC, may also be deemed the beneficial owner of these shares.
footnotes.F7: Shares sold by Hestia LLC on behalf of a separately managed account in order to better align with the maximum concentration guidelines for single stock investment of the separately managed account.
footnotes.F8: The price reported in column 4 is a weighted average price, rounded to the nearest cent. These shares were purchased in multiple transactions at prices ranging from $30.82 to $31.36, inclusive. The reporting person undertakes to provide to GameStop Corp., any security holder of GameStop Corp. or the staff of the Securities and Exchange Commission, upon request, full information regarding the number of shares purchased at each separate price within the range.
footnotes.F9: Includes 21,400 shares beneficially owned jointly with Mr. Wolf's wife.
